rationale.fallback: BV1B/BV3D agree at 1.05% on scoped corpus; legacy BV1 snapshot remains 69.16% on wider artifact set — scope dominates rate.
rationale.speaker: BV3D corpus shows 0 speaker_repair events across 95 FEM turns; recurrence history is protected-replay-only and backfill-inflated.

event_definitions.deterministic_fallback: opening_deterministic_fallback content owner or upstream_prepared opening.
event_definitions.opening_fallback: fallback_kind scene_opening or diegetic scene_opening family.
event_definitions.repair_triggered_fallback: response_type_prepared_emission, gate_terminal_repair realization family, repair-triggered replacements.
event_definitions.sanitizer_triggered_fallback: sanitizer_* protected fields or sanitizer stage lineage (sparse in artifact corpus).

replay_vs_runtime_comparison.interpretation: Protected replay recurrence measures acceptance failures and governance keys, not turn-level incidence. Runtime artifact incidence varies sharply by corpus scope (legacy 69% vs BV3D 1%).

protected_replay_speaker_recurrence.note: BV8A: 8 raw projection-key rows collapse to 1 historical defect (vocative_override_after_prior_continuity backfill duplication).

event_definitions.speaker_adoption: Post-emission speaker identity accepted without repair (inferred: no speaker_repair lineage event on turn).
event_definitions.speaker_correction: Lineage event_kind=speaker_repair with repair_kind token (e.g. canonical_rewrite, narrator_neutral).
event_definitions.speaker_finalize_divergence: Finalize stack divergence between dialogue plan and emitted speaker (BX/BT parity probes; not separately counted in BV3D corpus).
event_definitions.speaker_mismatch: Protected replay field drift on selected_speaker_id or strict-social wrong-speaker scenario failure.
event_definitions.speaker_relocation: Route/target change with selected_speaker_id movement (protected: trace.canonical_entry.*, route_kind).

protected_replay_recurrence.dedupe_note: BV8A: 8 raw projection-key rows collapse to 1 historical defect (vocative_override_after_prior_continuity backfill duplication).

protected_replay_regression_recurrence_r.definition: Share of observed recurrence keys with occurrence_count >= 2 in the measured history window.
protected_replay_regression_recurrence_r.interpretation: Initial measurable proxy for recurrence keys that became active after prior observation; refine when richer state transitions exist. Advisory and report-only; does not gate protected replay.
